items.title: AirTag 2 gets its first firmware update since January launch
items.summary: In addition to a firmware update for the new AirPods Max 2, which are set to hit the shelves tomorrow (and we have already reviewed ), Apple also rolled out a firmware update to the AirTag 2 earlier today. Here are the details.

items.title: Ollama adopts MLX for faster AI performance on Apple silicon Macs
items.summary: One of the best tools to run AI models locally on a Mac just got even better. Here's why, and how to run it.

items.title: Salesforce announces an AI-heavy makeover for Slack, with 30 new features
items.summary: Slack just got a whole lot more useful.

items.title: Apple among US firms Iran labels 'terrorist companies' as it threatens attacks
items.summary: As reported by CBS News , Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) vowed to start attacking US-based tech and finance companies in the Mideast starting tomorrow. Here are the details.

items.title: Apple CEO Tim Cook delivered speech & rung Nasdaq Opening Bell Tuesday
items.summary: As a part of the ongoing 50th anniversary celebration, Apple was invited to remotely ring in the Nasdaq Opening Bell. CEO Tim Cook did the honors and gave a speech from Apple Park. Apple's executive team gathered for the opening bell....

items.title: Apple Releases First Firmware Update for AirTag 2
items.summary: Apple today released new firmware for its second-generation AirTag item trackers. The firmware has a 3.0.45 version number, up from 3.0.41, and it is the first firmware update that Apple has provided for the ‌AirTag‌ 2 that launched in...

items.title: Robotaxi companies refuse to say how often their AVs need remote help
items.summary: Aurora, May Mobility, Motional, Nuro, Tesla, Waymo, and Zoox all refused to cough up a number during Senator Ed Markey's recent investigation.

items.title: CapEx Up for Foundry, Memory
items.summary: Semiconductor Intelligence estimates total semiconductor industry capital spending (CapEx) was $166 billion in 2025, up 7% from 2024. We estimate 2026 CapEx will be $200 billion, up 20% from 2025. TSMC was the largest spender in 2024 with...
